full_text:
An update for librepo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The librepo library provides a C and Python API to download repository metadata.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.0] packagekit crash during Files installation in cockpit web [RHEL 10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101181)
